description: A shipment of new towels has arrived from the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the purchase order associated with the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: The correct PO is located in the system.

nodes.task_description: Count the items in the shipment and verify that the quantity matches the purchase order.

expected_outcome.value: The physical count matches the PO.

nodes.task_description: Update the inventory management system to reflect the receipt of the new stock.

expected_outcome.value: The stock levels for towels are increased in the system.
